---
title: "Home"
toc: false
---
<!--
This homepage is intentionally simple.
You can always add more later — start with clarity.
-->

::: {.columns .home-hero}
::: {.column width="65%"}
# Your Name

<div class="home-subtitle">Your role / job title</div>

<!-- PROMPT:
2–4 sentences is plenty.
Say who you are, what you work on, and why it matters.
No need to tell your whole life story 🙂
-->
Write a short professional bio here. Focus on your research or technical domain,
the kinds of methods or tools you use, and the impact you care about.

<!-- PROMPT:
Optional one-liner.
This could be an affiliation, institute, research group, or focus area.
-->
*Affiliation · Institute · Research focus (optional)*

{{< include _partials/links.html >}}


:::

::: {.column width="35%"}
<!--
PROMPT:
Use a photo, illustration, or abstract banner image.
This template uses an avatar/banner by default to keep things low-pressure.
-->
![](assets/images/profile.png){.profile-pic fig-alt="Profile image or banner"}
:::
:::

---

## Focus areas

<!--
PROMPT:
Pick 2–4 areas you’d be happy to talk about if someone asked,
“What do you actually work on?”
-->

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Your research area 1
<!-- PROMPT: 1–2 lines describing this area -->
What you study, build, or analyse — and why it matters.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Your research area 2
<!-- PROMPT: 1–2 lines describing this area -->
Methods, tools, or approaches you are known for.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Your research area 3
<!-- PROMPT: 1–2 lines describing this area -->
Impact, translation, or community work you care about.
:::
:::

---

## Start here

<!--
PROMPT:
These links help visitors (and future you!) navigate the site.
Think of this as a “signpost” section.
-->

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card}
[**Projects →**](pages/projects.qmd)

Short case studies showing what you did, how you did it, and why it matters.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card}
[**Résumé for Research →**](pages/resume.qmd)

A narrative CV using four modules, aligned with current funder expectations.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card}
[**Outputs →**](pages/outputs.qmd)

Publications, talks, software, datasets, and other things you’ve put into the world.
:::
:::
:::
